description: Create a custom View component named StatusDotView in the com.example.logisticsdashboard.views package of the LogisticsDashboard project. The component must support a custom XML attribute named dotColor defined in res/values/attrs.xml, defaulting to Red if not specified. The view should render a filled circle centered within its bounds with a radius determined by the view's dimensions. Integrate the StatusDotView into activity_main.xml using a specific color to demonstrate functionality and ensure the project builds successfully.
